description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two jobs. In the deploy stage add a push_github job that runs the two curl commands: first `curl -sL https://gitlab.com/ludeeus/toolbox/raw/master/CI-Scripts/push_to_public_repo/init.sh | bash -s github HA-Custom_components root /ruter`, then `curl -sL https://gitlab.com/ludeeus/toolbox/raw/master/CI-Scripts/push_to_public_repo/push.sh | bash -s Europe/Oslo`. In the build stage add an update_readme job that runs `curl -X POST -F token=$README_TOKEN -F ref=master -F variables[single_repo]=ruter https://gitlab.com/api/v4/projects/7064305/trigger/pipeline`. No specific Docker image, services, caches, artifacts, or rules are defined.
